moments.title: Wimbledon Finals Weekend
moments.blurb: The 2026 Wimbledon Championships conclude this weekend, with the Gentlemen's Singles Final taking place on Sunday, July 12th.

angles.name: Finals Hype
angles.copy: Who lifts the trophy? The Wimbledon Gentlemen's Singles Final is set for tomorrow. Who are you backing for glory on Centre Court?

angles.name: London Buzz
angles.copy: The SW19 buzz is electric! Wimbledon's men's final tomorrow brings the curtain down on another incredible tournament. Have you been soaking up the atmosphere?

moments.title: The Open Championship Kicks Off
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship begins its practice rounds this Sunday, July 12th, at Royal Birkdale Golf Club, with tournament play from July 16-19.

angles.name: Golf Major Week
angles.copy: Get ready for golf's biggest test! The Open Championship begins practice days this weekend before the Claret Jug is contested from Thursday at Royal Birkdale.

angles.name: Birkdale Buzz
angles.copy: Royal Birkdale is primed and ready! The Open Championship arrives on the Merseyside coast this week. Who's your pick for the famous Claret Jug?

moments.title: Latitude Festival Approaches
moments.blurb: Latitude Festival 2026 takes place from July 23-26 at Henham Park, Suffolk, featuring headliners David Byrne, Teddy Swims, and Lewis Capaldi.

angles.name: Festival Countdown
angles.copy: Only a few days until Latitude Festival takes over Henham Park! Who are you most excited to see, from David Byrne to Lewis Capaldi?

angles.name: Line-up Hype
angles.copy: Latitude Festival is just around the corner! Four days of music, comedy, and arts in Suffolk. What's top of your must-see list?

moments.title: Suzanne Vega turns 67
moments.blurb: American singer-songwriter Suzanne Vega, known for hits like 'Luka' and 'Tom's Diner', celebrates her 67th birthday today, July 11th.

angles.name: Happy Birthday Suzanne
angles.copy: Happy 67th birthday to the iconic Suzanne Vega! Still love 'Luka' and 'Tom's Diner' as much as the first time we heard them. What's your favourite Suzanne Vega track?

moments.title: Lil' Kim turns 51
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning rapper, model, and actress Lil' Kim celebrates her 51st birthday today, July 11th.

angles.name: Queen Bee's Birthday
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 51st birthday to the one and only Queen Bee, Lil' Kim! What's your ultimate Lil' Kim anthem?

moments.title: Roger McGuinn (The Byrds) turns 84
moments.blurb: Roger McGuinn, co-founder of the influential folk-rock band The Byrds, celebrates his 84th birthday on Monday, July 13th.

angles.name: Byrds Legend Birthday
angles.copy: Jingle-jangle guitar icon Roger McGuinn of The Byrds turns 84 on Monday! What's your favourite Byrds track or a memory of their music?

moments.title: Deborah Cox turns 52
moments.blurb: Canadian R&B superstar Deborah Cox, known for her powerful vocals and hits like 'Nobody's Supposed to Be Here', celebrates her 52nd birthday on Monday, July 13th.

angles.name: R&B Diva Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 52nd birthday to the incredible Deborah Cox! Her voice is pure magic. What's your go-to Deborah Cox power ballad?

moments.title: Leon Bridges turns 37
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning American soul singer Leon Bridges, known for his retro sound and hits like 'Coming Home', celebrates his 37th birthday on Monday, July 13th.

angles.name: Soulful Birthday
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 37th birthday to the smooth sounds of Leon Bridges! His music is a modern classic. What's your favourite Leon Bridges song?

moments.title: Linda Ronstadt turns 80
moments.blurb: Legendary American singer Linda Ronstadt, known for her versatile voice across rock, folk, country, and pop, celebrates her 80th birthday on Tuesday, July 15th.

angles.name: Music Icon's Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 80th birthday to the incomparable Linda Ronstadt! A true music legend whose voice touched so many genres. What's your favourite Linda Ronstadt hit?

moments.title: Joe Satriani turns 70
moments.blurb: Influential American instrumental rock guitarist Joe Satriani celebrates his 70th birthday on Tuesday, July 15th.

angles.name: Guitar God Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 70th birthday to the incredible guitar virtuoso, Joe Satriani! His riffs have inspired generations. What's your favourite Satch track?

moments.title: Olly Alexander (Years & Years) turns 36
moments.blurb: British singer, songwriter, and actor Olly Alexander, frontman of Years & Years and recent Eurovision representative, celebrates his 36th birthday on Tuesday, July 15th.

angles.name: Pop Star Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 36th birthday to the brilliant Olly Alexander! From Years & Years to Eurovision, he always delivers. What's your favourite Olly moment?

moments.title: Stewart Copeland (The Police) turns 74
moments.blurb: Stewart Copeland, the legendary drummer and co-founder of The Police, celebrates his 74th birthday on Wednesday, July 16th.

angles.name: Drumming Legend Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 74th birthday to the iconic Stewart Copeland! The driving force behind The Police. What's your favourite Police track with his unmistakable drumming?

moments.title: Ed Kowalczyk (Live) turns 55
moments.blurb: Ed Kowalczyk, lead singer of the alternative rock band Live, celebrates his 55th birthday on Wednesday, July 16th.

angles.name: Live Frontman Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 55th birthday to Ed Kowalczyk of Live! So many anthems. Which Live song takes you back?

moments.title: Wizkid turns 35
moments.blurb: Nigerian superstar singer and songwriter Wizkid, a global icon in Afrobeats, celebrates his 35th birthday on Wednesday, July 16th.

angles.name: Afrobeats King Birthday
angles.copy: Big up the Starboy! Wizkid turns 35 on Wednesday. Celebrate the Afrobeats king by dropping your favourite Wizkid track!

moments.title: Geezer Butler (Black Sabbath) turns 77
moments.blurb: Terence 'Geezer' Butler, the legendary bassist and primary lyricist for Black Sabbath, celebrates his 77th birthday on Thursday, July 17th.

angles.name: Metal Legend Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 77th birthday to the godfather of heavy metal bass, Geezer Butler! What's your favourite Black Sabbath riff he helped create?

moments.title: Wolfgang Flür (Kraftwerk) turns 79
moments.blurb: Wolfgang Flür, former electronic percussionist for the pioneering German electronic band Kraftwerk, celebrates his 79th birthday on Thursday, July 17th.

angles.name: Electronic Pioneer Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 79th birthday to Wolfgang Flür, a true pioneer of electronic music with Kraftwerk! What's your favourite Kraftwerk banger?

moments.title: Natasha Hamilton (Atomic Kitten) turns 44
moments.blurb: Natasha Hamilton, singer from the hugely successful British girl group Atomic Kitten, celebrates her 44th birthday on Thursday, July 17th.

angles.name: Atomic Kitten Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 44th birthday to Natasha Hamilton of Atomic Kitten! So many noughties hits. What's your favourite Atomic Kitten singalong?

moments.title: Luke Bryan turns 50
moments.blurb: American country music superstar Luke Bryan, known for his numerous chart-topping hits and energetic live shows, celebrates his 50th birthday on Thursday, July 17th.

angles.name: Country Star's Big 5-0
angles.copy: Happy 50th birthday to country music sensation Luke Bryan! Raise a glass to his incredible career. What's your favourite Luke Bryan track?

moments.title: Tom Fletcher (McFly) turns 41
moments.blurb: Tom Fletcher, lead vocalist and guitarist of the popular British pop-rock band McFly, celebrates his 41st birthday on Thursday, July 17th.

angles.name: McFly Birthday Boy
angles.copy: Happy 41st birthday to McFly's very own Tom Fletcher! From pop-rock anthems to best-selling books, he does it all. What's your favourite McFly song?

moments.title: Brian May (Queen) turns 79
moments.blurb: Legendary Queen guitarist Brian May, known for his iconic riffs and astronomical talent, celebrates his 79th birthday on Saturday, July 19th.

angles.name: Rock Royalty Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 79th birthday to the one and only Dr. Brian May! What's your favourite Queen guitar solo or riff from the legend?

moments.title: Alan Gorrie (Average White Band) turns 77
moments.blurb: Alan Gorrie, co-founder, bassist, and vocalist of the Scottish funk and R&B band Average White Band, celebrates his 77th birthday on Saturday, July 19th.

angles.name: Funk Legend Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 77th birthday to the funky Alan Gorrie from Average White Band! Get down with some classic soul. What's your favourite AWB track?

moments.title: School Summer Holidays Begin
moments.blurb: School summer holidays are set to begin for many pupils across England and Wales from around July 22nd, marking the start of the long break.

angles.name: Freedom!
angles.copy: The countdown is ON for summer holidays! For many, school's out from next week. What are your big plans for the long break?

angles.name: Wales Summer Break
angles.copy: Summer holidays are just around the corner for pupils across Wales! What's top of the list for family fun this year?

angles.name: Devon Schools Out
angles.copy: Devon schools are almost out for summer! What exciting adventures are you planning for the long break in Exeter and beyond?
